title: 2002 Nagorno-Karabakh presidential election
summary: Presidential elections were held in the Nagorno-Karabakh Republic on 11 August 2002. The result was a victory for incumbent President Arkadi Ghukasyan, who received 89% of the vote.
text:
Presidential elections were held in the Nagorno-Karabakh Republic on 11 August 2002. The result was a victory for incumbent President Arkadi Ghukasyan, who received 89% of the vote.
